subcodes.first_line: This is the Book sent down by the All-Merciful unto them that dwell in the realm of possibility; verily, it is the Fountain of Life for those who have turned their faces towards the Most Exalted Horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن فی الامکان و انه لکوثر الحیوان للذین توجهوا الی الافق الاعلی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa]
